nasb.text: A man who loves wisdom makes his father glad, But he who keeps company with harlots wastes his wealth.

esv.text: He who loves wisdom makes his father glad, but a companion of prostitutes squanders his wealth.

cnv.text: 喜愛智慧的，使父親喜樂； 親近妓女的，耗盡家財。

ccb.text: 爱慕智慧的使父亲欢欣， 结交妓女的必耗尽钱财。

csbs.text: 喜爱智慧的，使父亲欢喜； 结交妓女的，必失丧财物。
